Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class OnePointProcessor<T extends Formula<T>>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.OnePointProcessor<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
OnePointProcessorInference, OnePointProcessorRewriting
public abstract class OnePointProcessor<T extends Formula<T>> extends Object
Framework for handling one point rules. This class is used for various processing regarding inference rules ONE_POINT_L and ONE_POINT_R as well as rewriting rules SIMP_IN_COMPSET, SIMP_IN_COMPSET_ONEPOINT and SIMP_COMPSET_EQUAL.
  • for inference rules ONE_POINT_L and ONE_POINT_R, the processing is done in OnePointProcessorInference
  • for rewriting rules SIMP_IN_COMPSET and SIMP_IN_COMPSET_ONEPOINT, the processing is done in OnePointProcessorRewriting
  • for rewriting rules SIMP_COMPSET_EQUAL, the processing is done in OnePointProcessor

These operations are initiated in the method matchAndInstantiate, which is the entry point for external accesses.

  • Method Details

    • matchAndInstantiate

      public abstract void matchAndInstantiate()

    • instantiate

      protected final Predicate instantiate(Predicate predicate)
      Performs one or several instantiations, by calling OnePointInstantiator.

    • checkReplacement

      protected boolean checkReplacement(RelationalPredicate pred)
      Given a predicate with tag EQUAL, returns whether or not this predicate is a valid replacement. If it is, then the replacement is stored for the forthcoming instantiation.

    • isValidReplacement

      private boolean isValidReplacement(BoundIdentifier boundIdent, Expression expression)

    • isMapletEquality

      protected boolean isMapletEquality(RelationalPredicate pred)

    • breakMaplet

      protected List<Predicate> breakMaplet(RelationalPredicate pred)
      Breaks an equality of maplets into a list of equalities between the children of the maplets. For instance, a↦b = c↦d shall be rewritten in a=c ∧ b=d.

    • availableReplacement

      protected boolean availableReplacement()

    • wasSuccessfullyApplied

      public boolean wasSuccessfullyApplied()

    • getProcessedResult

      public T getProcessedResult()
